mapper.select: SELECT TRUNC("SUM" (TON)) FROM ( SELECT "ABS" (TON) "TON" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE TO_CHAR (CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY') = #{value} )
SELECT TRUNC("SUM" (TON)) FROM ( SELECT "ABS" (TON) "TON" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE TO_CHAR (CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM') = #{value} )
SELECT TRUNC("SUM" (TON)) FROM ( SELECT "ABS" (TON) "TON" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE TO_CHAR (CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{value} )
SELECT COUNT (*) "inPortCarNum" FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE WEIGH_OUT_DT IS NULL AND WEIGH_IN_DT IS NOT NULL AND INV_NO IS NOT NULL

SELECT ROUND ("SUM"("time") / count(*), 0) "inPortCarDuration" FROM ( SELECT ROUND ( TO_NUMBER (SYSDATE - WEIGH_IN_DT) * 24 * 60, 0 ) "time" FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE IS_TALLY = 0 AND INV_NO IS NOT NULL AND "TO_CHAR" (WEIGH_IN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') UNION SELECT ROUND ( TO_NUMBER ( b.CREATE_TIME - A .WEIGH_IN_DT ) * 24 * 60, 0 ) "time" FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND A, T_YARD_TALLY b WHERE A .note_id = b.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID AND A .IS_TALLY = 1 AND "TO_CHAR" (A .WEIGH_IN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A .INV_NO IS NOT NULL )

SELECT A .TRUCK_PLATE "carNum", TO_CHAR ( A .WEIGH_IN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi' ) "inPortDate", A .GOODS_NAME "cargoName", A .COM_NAME "shipName", B.WEIGHT "planTon", A .REC_UNIT "cargoOwner", ROUND ( TO_NUMBER (SYSDATE - WEIGH_IN_DT) * 24 * 60, 0 ) "inPortTime" FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND A LEFT JOIN T_BUS_VEHICLE_RESERVATION B ON A.TSPT_ID = B.TASK_NO WHERE A .WEIGH_OUT_DT IS NULL AND A .WEIGH_IN_DT IS NOT NULL AND A .INV_NO IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT (*) "inPortCarNum" FROM S_INPORT_CAR WHERE TO_CHAR (IN_PORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND PORT_CODE = #{portCode}

SELECT ROUND (SUM(IN_PORT_TIME), 0) "inPortCarDuration" FROM S_INPORT_CAR WHERE TO_CHAR (IN_PORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND PORT_CODE = #{portCode}

SELECT CAR_NUM "carNum", SHIP_NAME "shipName", CARGO_NAME "cargoName", PLAN_TON "planTon", CARGO_OWNER "cargoOwner", TO_CHAR ( IN_PORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi' ) "inPortDate", IN_PORT_TIME "inPortTime" FROM S_INPORT_CAR WHERE TO_CHAR (IN_PORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND PORT_CODE = #{portCode}

SELECT "SUM" (B.TON) "ton", A .PACKING_CODE "packingCode", A .PACKING_NAME "packingName" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO A, T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL b WHERE A . ID = b.CARGO_INFO_ID GROUP BY A .PACKING_CODE, A .PACKING_NAME
SELECT "SUM" (B.TON) "ton", A .CARGO_NAME "cargoName" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO A, T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL b WHERE A . ID = b.CARGO_INFO_ID HAVING "SUM" (B.TON) > 0 GROUP BY A .CARGO_NAME

SELECT A .BERTH_NAME "berthName", A .SHIP_NAME "shipName", TO_CHAR(A .BERTH_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD') "berthTime" , B .LOAD_UNLOAD "loadOrUnload", B.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME "cargoName", "SUM" (B.CARGO_NUM) "ton", B. ID "id" FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DAYNIGTTPLAN TDSD, T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE A, T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM B WHERE A .SHIP_STATUS_CODE != '120' AND TDSD.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = A.ID AND B.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = A . ID AND TDSD.PLAN_DATE > TO_DATE (#{searchDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY B. ID, A .BERTH_NAME, A .SHIP_NAME, A .BERTH_TIME, B .LOAD_UNLOAD, B.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME

SELECT "SUM" (c.TON) FROM T_BUS_TRUST A, T_PRD_WORK_PLAN B, T_PRD_WORK_TICKET c WHERE A . ID = b.TRUST_ID AND c.WORK_PLAN_ID = b. ID AND A .SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId} AND a.TYPE = #{type}

SELECT A .SHIP_NAME "shipName", TO_CHAR (A.BERTH_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') "berthTime", '' "leaveTime", A . ID "id", A .SHIP_STATUS_CODE "shipStatusCode", A .SHIP_STATUS_NAME "shipStatusName" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE A WHERE A .SHIP_STATUS_CODE != '20' AND A .SHIP_NAME NOT LIKE '%测试%' AND A .CREATE_TIME > TO_DATE (#{searchDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY A .BERTH_TIME DESC
SELECT TO_CHAR ( DYNAMIC_START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{id} AND DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE = '120' AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT TO_CHAR ( DYNAMIC_START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{id} AND DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE = '50' AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY DYNAMIC_START_TIME

SELECT ROUND ("SUM"("time") / count(*), 0) "inPortCarDuration" FROM ( SELECT ROUND ( TO_NUMBER (SYSDATE - WEIGH_IN_DT) * 24 * 60, 0 ) "time" FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE IS_TALLY = 0 AND INV_NO IS NOT NULL AND "TO_CHAR" (WEIGH_IN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') UNION SELECT ROUND ( TO_NUMBER ( b.CREATE_TIME - A .WEIGH_IN_DT ) * 24 * 60, 0 ) "time" FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND A, T_YARD_TALLY b WHERE A .note_id = b.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID AND A .IS_TALLY = 1 AND "TO_CHAR" (A .WEIGH_IN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A .INV_NO IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT IN_PORT_TIME "time" FROM S_INPORT_CAR WHERE TO_CHAR (IN_PORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
